word: G5252 - ὑπερφρονέω - hyperphronéō - hoop-er-fron-eh'-o - Think more highly

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Think more highly
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to think more highly of oneself than is proper
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5228 and G5426; to esteem oneself overmuch, that is, be vain or arrogant: - think more highly.
